name: KodeKloud (Free Tier)
desc: Best-in-class hands-on DevOps courses with browser-based labs. Free courses include Docker, Kubernetes, Linux & Git for absolute beginners. Labs are the killer feature here — you practice real commands without installing anything.

name: CloudCaptain
desc: 100% free, open-source learning hub with 150+ documentation pages, 49 architecture diagrams, 8 career paths & 7 structured roadmaps covering Cloud, DevOps & AI. Hands-on exercises, cheat sheets & interview Q&A included.

name: Cloud Advocate (Krishna Gadhiraju)
desc: DevSecOps expert and AWS/GCP architect providing tutorials on DevOps, cloud architecture, security best practices, and multi-cloud strategies. Great for engineers targeting cloud-native DevOps or DevSecOps roles.
